heading: Duties of Secretary; surveys, research, etc.; proj­ects
label: 553 Duties of Secretary; surveys, research, etc.; proj­ects

children.label: a
children.text: to conduct surveys, investigations, and research relating to the causes and extent of outcrop and underground fires in coal formations and the methods for control or extinguishment of such fires; to publish the results of any such surveys, investigations, and researches; and to disseminate information concerning such method; and

children.label: b
children.text: to plan and execute projects for control or extinguishment of fires in coal formations.
